articles.title: Bitcoin Institutional Outflows Near One-Year Highs, More Downside Coming?
articles.description: With the price of bitcoin still trading below $40,000, institutional inflows into the digital asset have slowed significantly. This has now flowed into other digital assets in the space. But what is most significant is the outflow rate which has neared one-year lows.
